title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: Grant Sanderson's 3Blue1Brown explores the fundamental compressibility of language and the connection between compression and intelligence. The video visualizes entropy through compression, drawing on Shannon's information theory and examining the predictability of English text.
